title: Tech blog snippet
text: We migrated from Postgres to a custom solution last quarter. The trade-offs surprised us. Queries are 3x faster, but ops overhead grew. Looking back, would I do it again? Honestly, yes — but with way more upfront planning.

tips.target: We migrated from Postgres to a custom solution last quarter. The trade-offs surprised us. Queries are 3x faster, but
ops overhead grew. Looking back, would I do it again? Honestly, yes — but with way more upfront planning.

character_tips.anna: Tech blog style. Engineers write more than they code.
